basics.name: Faizan Yousaf
basics.title: Full-Stack Developer & AI Engineer
basics.summary: Computer Science student with experience in full-stack web development using React, Next.js, Node.js and Django. Built AI-assisted features using NLP, Generative AI, and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG). Comfortable working with REST and FastAPI services and SQL/NoSQL databases. Interested in building practical applications that combine AI with modern web systems.

education.institution: National University of Computer and Emerging sciences

bullets: Developed a speech-to-text pipeline using Whisper for meeting transcription and applied NLP summarization to extract key discussion points.
Implemented semantic search using FAISS for efficient vector indexing and similarity-based retrieval.
Built a loan approval prediction system using Pandas and Scikit-learn with structured dataset preprocessing and feature engineering.
Performed data cleaning, exploratory data analysis, and model evaluation to improve prediction accuracy.

projects.title: HealthMate (Final Year Project)
bullets: Developed a cross-platform mobile health application with Flutter and Dart that enables users to securely submit lifestyle data, health metrics, and genetic SNP questionnaire responses.
Implemented secure authentication, real-time data storage, and wearable device integration using Firebase services to enable continuous health monitoring and structured data collection.

projects.title: AI Knowledge OS
bullets: Built a full-stack application for managing project notes and documentation with semantic search using RAG and vector embeddings.
Implemented JWT-based authentication and an AI chat interface that retrieves and summarizes relevant project information.

projects.title: RAG for diagnostic reasoning for Clinical Notes
bullets: Implemented a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) based clinical Q&A system using MIMIC-IV healthcare dataset, integrating LLMs with a Streamlit interface to enable intelligent medical information exploration.
Designed a context-aware medical assistant that retrieves relevant clinical records in real time using vector embeddings and semantic similarity search to generate context-aware responses.

projects.title: VerbatimAI
bullets: Developed a meeting analysis system that converts recorded meetings into structured insights using speech-to-text transcription and NLP-based summarization.
Designed an interactive Streamlit interface enabling semantic search and insight discovery from meeting transcripts using embedding-based similarity retrieval.

projects.title: Neural-Machine-Translation-Urdu-to-Roman-Urdu
bullets: Neural Machine Translation system for Urdu → Roman Urdu using a BiLSTM encoder-decoder with Bahdanau attention.
Optimized for poetic text and trained on ~21k authentic verses from Rekhta Ghazals.
projects.notes: Specialized for poetry; pre-processing and tokenization tailored for Urdu script.

projects.title: Conversational-Chatbot-in-Urdu
bullets: Conversational chatbot in Urdu using a Transformer encoder-decoder architecture supporting multiple decoding strategies (Greedy, Beam Search, Top-k).
Includes notebook examples demonstrating training and decoding.
projects.notes: Includes example notebooks and evaluation scripts; suitable for conversational and short-form poetic responses.

certifications: Coursera – Machine Learning Specialization (Supervised Learning, Unsupervised Learning, Advanced Learning Algorithms)

achievements.item: Developed automated meeting transcription and NLP summarization pipeline.
Improved loan prediction accuracy via advanced feature engineering.
Integrated genetic SNP questionnaires with wearable device data.
